name: Vegetable and Coconut Curry
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop the green chili.
2. Crush the garlic clove.
3. Trim the green beans.
4. Cut the peppers into strips.
5. Cut the cauliflower into florets.
6. Cut the zucchini into rounds.
7. Cut the yellow squash into halves.
8. Dice the potatoes.
9. Chop the coriander leaves.
10. In a large heavy-based pan, melt the butter over low heat.
11. Add the onion and cook until soft.
12. Add the green chili, garlic, and ginger; stir for 3-4 minutes.
13. Stir in cardamom, turmeric, and cinnamon; cook, stirring, for 2-3 minutes.
14. Add the coconut milk and lemon rind. Simmer gently, uncovered, for 10 minutes.
15. Add the vegetables and cook, uncovered, until tender.
16. Stir in the coconut cream and simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
17. Serve on a large platter, garnished with fresh coriander leaves.
